_rationale: code_insight with no arguments defaults to mode=overview on both Go and C++. Emits a 350-byte LCF payload with REPOSITORY MAP + HEALTH sections. Byte-identical on multi-lang. Retrofitted with full _rationale per iter-7 karpathy rule. The mode-statistics/structure/unified/git_analyze/git_hotspots descriptors lock the per-mode dispatch path; this descriptor specifically locks the default (no-mode-given) behaviour so a regression that changes the default would surface here even if every explicit mode still works.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope matches MCP spec. result.content[].text byte-for-byte identical 350-byte overview LCF payload on multi-lang. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/code_insight___.{go,cpp}.json.
